art_highlights: Nick Bustamante exhibition at LASM explores themes of family and legacy.
Boston City Hall hosts 'Recalibrate' performance art event.
LA events: 'Convergence' at Forest Lawn and '50 Years of Art' at Craig Krull Gallery.
Chicago Gallery News showcases West Town Weekend Art Walk featuring multiple galleries.
Dr. Jay Anderson lectures on 'Threadbare Tales From Silk Road' in Maryland.

market_summary.market_sentiment: Negative; global markets volatile due to Middle East conflict and oil price spikes.
market_summary.key_drivers: Persian Gulf conflict, high interest rates, persistent inflation.
market_summary.trend: Major U.S. indices (S&P 500, Nasdaq, Dow) hit multi-week lows; Indian markets show resilience with minor recovery in IT/Metal.
